/CAL:FOR I & A AND P & C/TN:CARLOS DANIEL ARTIAGACOLINDRE/TEXT:CONFL CNSLAPPTD/CON:ALEXANDRIA CARL/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:04-12-22 (10TH)/X:THE 60TH DAY IS 05-27-22 (60TH)/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE: COURT IMPOSES A NO DRIVE CONDITION AND :/WS/SA4:AREA BOUNDED BY LARKING ST, O'FARRELL ST, TAYLOR ST, GOLDEN GATE AVE, ANDAREA BOUNDED BY MARKET ST, 9TH ST, HOWARD ST, 5TH ST,/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ONTHE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE:1 HOUR/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/DAWT/X: DEFENDANT IS REPRESENTED BY CONFLICT COUNSEL ALEXANDRA CARL IN ANOTHER MATTER, MS, CARL IS UNABLE TO APPEAR TODAY AND REQUESTS THAT THE MATTER BE CONTINUED,/BAIL: 25000/CONT/CAUSE/DOPC/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/VD: PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 04-11-22/NTW60/LDPX: 05-27-22(60)/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE, TO SET OR DISPOSITION/DO
